name: combat-state-contract
description: Per-round combat state tracking: combatant status, action economy, conditions, death saves

combatant_state.name: string — display name

conditions.duration_remaining: int — rounds remaining (-1 = permanent until dispelled)
conditions.source: string — source combatant or effect ID

combatant_state.concentrating: bool — whether concentrating on a spell
combatant_state.concentration_spell: string|null — name of spell being concentrated on

action_economy.action: bool — true if action available this turn
action_economy.bonus_action: bool — true if bonus action available this turn
action_economy.reaction: bool — true if reaction available this turn

turn_order: string — array of combatant IDs in initiative order (highest first)
round_state.current_turn_index: int — index into turn_order for current actor
round_state.active_combatant_id: string — ID of combatant whose turn it is

combatants: combatant_state objects — all combatants in encounter
